name: agentcore-parallel-tools
input: You have access to weather and time tools. When asked about weather, use get_weather. When asked about time, use get_time. Be concise. Use both the get_weather tool AND the get_time tool for Paris. Call both tools exactly once each.
output:
<thinking>I have successfully retrieved both the weather and the current time for Paris using the tools. I can now provide the User with the requested information.</thinking>

The weather in Paris is currently Cloudy, with a temperature of 62 degrees Fahrenheit. The current time in Paris is 8:00 AM CET.
